name: socials-application
description: A compact social media alternative with an embedded shared Google Apps Script backend and native retro Messenger Plug-in.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check app/app.js && node --check app/app-games.js && node --check app/theme-law.js && node --check app/social-backend-config.js && node --check app/social-shared-backend.js && node --check app/messenger-backend-bridge.js && node --check app/messenger-plugin.js && node --check app/messenger-site-init.js
